rationale: Elec. Code §252.012 governs removal of campaign treasurers and is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 252.012. REMOVAL OF CAMPAIGN TREASURER. (a) A campaign treasurer appointed under this chapter may be removed at any time by the appointing authority by filing the written appointment of a successor in the same manner as the original appointment.
_note: Rule text pertains to campaign finance procedure; no overlap with proposed homestead exemption change.
